all_samples.description: All scored samples, including rows where the requested context did not activate.

effective_only.description: Only scored samples where the requested context sections were actually present.

reward_zero_only.description: Only scored samples with reward == 0. These metrics are mainly diagnostic because rank-based metrics can degenerate when all retained labels are failures.

reward_zero_effective_only.description: Only reward == 0 samples where the requested context sections were actually present. Mainly diagnostic for failure-only slices.
